<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: "Closes #NN". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass locally.
- [ ] Behavior changes include tests.
- [ ] **User-facing change?** Updated **all** of: `README.md` (Commands + feature bullets), the matching `docs/` page(s) + `docs/cli/overview.md`, and a `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` entry. (Internal refactors / test-only changes: none of these.)
- [ ] Design, data-model, flow, or guard change → `PLAN.md` updated.
- [ ] No release bump here — releases are a separate `chore/release-x.y.z` PR.
